description: An annotation layer attaching typed annotations to a pub.layers.expression. Covers token-tag, span, relation, tree, and other layer kinds. Each annotation has an anchor, a label, and optional confidence and features.

expression.description: AT URI of the pub.layers.expression.expression this layer annotates.

kindUri.description: AT URI of a record formally defining the annotation layer kind.

kind.description: Layer kind: token-tag, span, relation, tree, etc.

subkindUri.description: AT URI of a record formally defining the annotation subkind (e.g. a specific tag set).

subkind.description: More specific categorisation within the layer kind (e.g. POS, NER, dependency).

sourceMethodUri.description: AT URI of a record formally defining the source method.

sourceMethod.description: How annotations were produced: manual-native, automatic, converted, etc.

annotations.description: The individual annotations that make up this layer.

tokenizationId.description: UUID of the tokenization this layer is aligned to (for token-tag layers).

rank.description: Ordering rank when multiple layers of the same kind exist on the same expression.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this record was created.

annotation.description: A single annotation within an annotation layer.

anchor.description: Position this annotation targets (text span, token, or temporal span).

label.description: The annotation label (e.g. a POS tag, NER type, sentiment class).

text.description: The surface text covered by this annotation (optional, for readability).

confidence.description: Confidence score in the range 0–1000 (0 = none, 1000 = certain).

features.description: Additional linguistic features for this annotation.
